info.title: nupkgversion
info.description: nupkgversion is a .NET Global Tools for comparing two NuGet packages and determining whether differences trigger SemVer Major, Minor or Patch changes

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Diff two NuGet packages and generate a Semantic Version Increment [Major | Minor | Patch].

arguments.name: PACKAGE_DIRECTORY
arguments.description: Directory where the package to evaluate is located.

arguments.name: PACKAGE_FEED_URL
arguments.description: Uri of the package feed to compare against. NuGet.org set by default. [default: https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json]

arguments.name: INTERACTIVE
arguments.description: Whether interactive authentication for NuGet should be used.
